violations.text: Utensils in the (kitchen ) are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the (prep) area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026
The condensate from the (walk in ) refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (dairy product) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

Working containers of (dry ingredients) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

(Frozen desserts) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

The condensate from the (walk in cooler ) refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

The (ceilings ) in the (retail ) area is in poor repair. Observed water stains and a leak from ceiling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
